speaker: Mayor Lurie
quote: Helping people feel safe walking downtown is the key to unleashing our city's comeback.

speaker: Chief Bill Scott
quote: Officers can focus on facilitating safe and clean streets in our most heavily traveled corridors.

speaker: DA Brooke Jenkins
quote: New tools and resources to address challenging public safety concerns.

speaker: Mayor Lurie
quote: Street encampments are dropping and violent crime is down 15%.

speaker: Mayor Lurie
quote: Listen we acknowledge displacement. That's going to happen. We're going to follow it wherever it goes.

speaker: Cmdr. Derrick Lew
quote: Displacement is a known symptom of the plain fact that we don't have the resources to blanket the entire city.

speaker: Mayor Lurie
quote: This city is safe. Crime is down 30% and car break-ins down 44%.

speaker: Mayor Lurie
quote: Homicides haven't been this low since 1954. SF is no longer a safe haven for those who want to sell drugs.

speaker: Chief Lew
quote: Historic reductions in crime show what's possible when we focus relentlessly on public safety.
